# UC-13.6.10 · Grafana Organization, Folder, Dashboard, and Datasource Permission Drift Audit, Privileged Action Forensics, and Least-Privilege Compliance

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Configuration, Compliance &middot; **Wave:** Walk &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We compare who can change and view each Grafana workspace to the approved list. When extra admin rights appear, outside email accounts gain edit access, or one folder collects a tangle of team rules, we raise a clear signal so owners tidy sharing before customer data spreads.*

---

## Description

Detects Grafana RBAC and permission integrity risks after authentication by correlating `grafana:audit` permission mutations, `grafana:apilog` privileged API forensics, `grafana:permission_snapshot` inventory diffs against approved baselines, and optional Splunk ES or ITSI correlation events so teams surface day-over-day ACL drift, non-organizational grants on sensitive orgs, builtin-role and team-sync drift hints, folder ACL explosions, datasource query elevation, dashboard inheritance bypass, service-account context, and Enterprise fine-grained RBAC assignments that bypass folder intent.

## Value

Platform and risk leaders reduce unintended exposure when Grafana becomes the control plane for dashboards backed by production SQL and Splunk credentials, while audit stakeholders receive a joined narrative that ties Splunk findings to org sensitivity tiers, approved role baselines, and configuration change density instead of isolated permission log lines.

## Implementation

Land grafana:audit, grafana:apilog, and grafana:permission_snapshot into index=grafana; publish grafana_org_inventory.csv and grafana_permission_baseline.csv; optionally emit grafana_permission_correlation into notable or itsi_tracked_alerts; save observability_uc_13_6_10_grafana_rbac_permission_drift every fifteen to thirty minutes with earliest twenty-four hours; route critical and high severities to platform observability on-call; archive weekly evidence exports.

## Evidence

Saved search observability_uc_13_6_10_grafana_rbac_permission_drift with fifteen or thirty minute schedule; Grafana RBAC review dashboard drilldowns; alert routing to platform observability on-call; weekly CSV and JSON exports archived to a restricted evidence index.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

In a lab Grafana org, grant a non-corporate test identity Editor on a folder tagged high sensitivity in grafana_org_inventory.csv while ingesting grafana:audit, grafana:apilog, and a permission snapshot row; confirm observability_uc_13_6_10_grafana_rbac_permission_drift returns critical or high severity with non-null recommended_action within thirty minutes.

### Negative scenario

After reverting the grant and aligning grafana_permission_baseline.csv, confirm severities remain low for the test resource_uid across six consecutive scheduled runs with only routine snapshot noise.

## Detailed Implementation

### Step 1 — Prerequisites

Head of Platform owns this control jointly with observability platform engineering, Grafana administrators who operate Grafana OSS and Grafana Enterprise estates, identity and directory teams that own LDAP and OAuth group mappings, and security operations staff who consume Splunk Enterprise Security notables or Splunk ITSI tracked alerts. This use case is deliberately not UC-13.6.5 authentication and session takeover analytics focused on login success and failure ratios, not UC-13.6.2 datasource query error triage, not UC-13.6.4 plugin version governance, and not UC-13.6.1 datasource health probes. It is the post-authentication authorization story: correlating Grafana audit narratives, reverse-proxy or sidecar API access logs, daily permission inventory snapshots, and optional ES or ITSI correlation events so teams see RBAC drift on folders, dashboards, datasources, and organizations before broad Edit or Admin grants become silent data-exposure paths.

Grafana exposes permissions through organization roles, folder and dashboard ACLs, datasource permissions, team memberships, and in Enterprise through fine-grained RBAC assignments and fixed roles. The HTTP surface area includes folder permission endpoints under `/api/folders/{uid}/permissions`, dashboard permission endpoints under `/api/dashboards/uid/{uid}/permissions`, datasource permission endpoints under `/api/datasources/{id}/permissions`, and Enterprise access-control routes such as `/api/access-control/users/{userId}/permissions` plus `/api/access-control/builtin-roles` when operators adjust defaults. Auditors care because a single elevated grant on a folder that contains finance or customer panels can cascade through inheritance until someone runs ad-hoc SQL or Splunk queries against production backends using stored datasource credentials.

Operational prerequisites include stable time synchronization between Grafana hosts, log forwarders, and Splunk indexers so day-over-day diffs align. You need credentials or tokens for a read-only automation account that can call permission export endpoints from a hardened worker, not from administrator laptops, and you need change-control metadata that identifies approved RBAC migration windows. Legal and privacy reviewers should approve retention for usernames, team names, and client IP addresses in security or observability indexes. Break-glass Grafana accounts belong in an explicit organizational unit with time-bound approvals; their API usage must still appear in this pipeline.

Inventory discipline matters. Maintain `grafana_org_inventory.csv` keyed on `org_id` with `owner`, `sensitivity_tier`, and `approved_roles` strings that describe which Grafana roles and fixed roles are expected for contractors, platform SREs, and line-of-business viewers. Maintain `grafana_permission_baseline.csv` keyed on `resource_uid` with `resource_type` and `expected_role_assignments` that encode the approved ACL shape for regulated folders and dashboards. Without baselines, Splunk can only show churn, not drift against policy.

Risk briefing: Grafana upgrades occasionally reshape default Viewer capabilities or migrate legacy ACL representations; tune suppression using vendor release notes. GitOps reconcilers that rewrite permissions every minute can look like sustained attack traffic until you label their service accounts in inventory. Team sync integrations can leave stale team memberships when directory groups are renamed; pair permission snapshots with IdP group change logs outside this UC when available.

Differentiation recap: RBAC and permission integrity on Grafana resources after login, including baseline diff, non-corporate grant detection, privileged API forensics, builtin-role drift hints, team-sync drift hints, ACL explosion, datasource elevation, inheritance bypass, service-account context, and Enterprise RBAC assignment audit — not login brute-force narratives, not query execution errors, not plugin catalog skew.

### Step 2 — Configure data collection

Stand up four complementary lanes that `multisearch` fans in parallel, plus two CSV knowledge objects, plus optional Change model acceleration for Grafana configuration mutations.

Lane A, Grafana audit JSON: enable Grafana audit logging to file, stdout, or a supported streaming sink and land events in `index=grafana` with `sourcetype=grafana:audit`. Preserve actions that reference permissions, folders, dashboards, datasources, teams, organizations, service accounts, API tokens, and builtin roles. Normalize `org_id`, actor identities, targets, and verbs. When Enterprise fixed roles change, ensure messages include enough context to distinguish Viewer default adjustments from Editor escalations.

Lane B, Grafana API access log: terminate TLS at a controlled ingress and emit `sourcetype=grafana:apilog` from nginx, Envoy, HAProxy, or a service mesh access log format. Retain HTTP method, path, status, bytes, latency, `clientip`, optional `auth_provider`, and a stable `user_login` or service identity when your proxy authenticates requests. This lane supplies privileged-API forensics for `POST /api/admin/users`, `PUT` mutations on folder permission routes, and destructive team routes independent of whether Grafana audit verbosity is temporarily reduced.

Lane C, permission inventory snapshot: schedule a hardened worker every twenty-four hours, or more frequently for high-sensitivity orgs, to export normalized permission rows via Grafana HTTP APIs and land them as `sourcetype=grafana:permission_snapshot` in `index=grafana`. Each row should carry `resource_uid`, `folder_uid`, `folder_title`, `dashboard_uid`, `dashboard_title`, `datasource_id`, `datasource_name`, `team_id`, `user_login`, `permission`, `role`, `inheritance_chain`, and `acl_entries` or `acl_entry_count` for the count of ACL rows attached to the folder or dashboard. Hash exports with a stable canonical JSON representation when compliance wants tamper hints.

Lane D, ES or ITSI correlation: when Splunk Enterprise Security or Splunk ITSI correlates Grafana permission drift with identity risk or change tickets, land a narrow feed in `index=notable` or `index=itsi_tracked_alerts` with `source=grafana_permission_correlation` carrying summarized `resource_uid`, `org_id`, and severity. Keep volume low so this arm augments rather than replaces primary Grafana evidence.

Knowledge object one: `lookups/grafana_org_inventory.csv` with columns `org_id`, optional `org_name`, `owner`, `sensitivity_tier`, and `approved_roles`.

Knowledge object two: `lookups/grafana_permission_baseline.csv` with columns `resource_uid`, `resource_type`, and `expected_role_assignments`.

Change model alignment: map Grafana configuration edits that Splunk ingests into the Common Information Model `Change` data model when your add-on populates `Change.user`, `Change.object`, and `Change.command` for Grafana setting mutations. Accelerate summaries where Job Inspector shows expensive joins.

Example curl helpers from a bastion after authenticating with a scoped admin token:

```bash
curl -fsS -H "Authorization: Bearer $GRAFANA_TOKEN" https://grafana.example.org/api/folders/uid/operations/permissions
curl -fsS -H "Authorization: Bearer $GRAFANA_TOKEN" https://grafana.example.org/api/dashboards/uid/exec_kpi/permissions
curl -fsS -H "Authorization: Bearer $GRAFANA_TOKEN" https://grafana.example.org/api/datasources/12/permissions
```

Pre-save validation: confirm each sourcetype returns events in a one-hour window, that a deliberate test grant appears in `grafana:audit`, that the same action is visible on `grafana:apilog` for the API path, and that the nightly snapshot job increments row counts for the touched `resource_uid`.

Dashboards: host an analyst view grouped by `org_id`, `resource_uid`, and `severity` with drilldowns to raw audit, API lines, snapshot rows, and correlation events.

### Step 3 — Create the search and alert

Save the SPL as `observability_uc_13_6_10_grafana_rbac_permission_drift` with a fifteen or thirty minute schedule in production, `dispatch.earliest_time=-24h@h`, `dispatch.latest_time=now`, and alert when `severity` is `critical` or `high`. Throttle duplicate `resource_uid` and `user_login` pairs for forty-five minutes unless severity escalates. Include `recommended_action`, `detect_axis`, and `baseline_drift` in pager narratives so responders open Grafana RBAC runbooks without rerunning ad hoc searches.

Pipeline narrative: `multisearch` fans audit mutations, API access lines, permission inventory snapshots, and ES or ITSI correlation rows so a silent single lane cannot hide a privilege escalation. `coalesce()` absorbs field naming drift across OSS, Enterprise, and Cloud samples. `streamstats` and `eventstats` compute rolling ACL mass and percentile baselines per `resource_uid` and `org_id` lane to highlight folder ACL explosions. `inputlookup` joins attach org sensitivity tiers and approved role strings while baseline CSV rows encode expected assignments. A `join` with `tstats` against the `Change` data model adds configuration-change density per actor for forensics. `case()` maps external identities on high-sensitivity orgs, baseline violations, inheritance bypass hints, privileged API patterns, ACL explosions, and correlation escalations into severity tiers.

Fenced SPL must match the top-level `spl` JSON field exactly:

```spl
`comment("UC-13.6.10 Grafana RBAC permission drift privileged API forensics multisearch earliest=-24h@h")`
| multisearch
    [ search index=grafana sourcetype=grafana:audit earliest=-24h@h latest=now
      | eval lane="audit_rbac"
      | eval lr=lower(_raw)
      | eval org_id=trim(toString(coalesce(orgId,org_id,"0")))
      | eval org_name=trim(toString(coalesce(org_name,orgName,"")))
      | eval actor=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(userId,user_id,username,actor,email,"unknown_actor"))))
      | eval user_login=actor
      | eval user_id=actor
      | eval target=trim(toString(coalesce(target,resourceUid,resource_uid,object_uid,"")))
      | eval httpmethod=""
      | eval endpoint=trim(toString(coalesce(requestUri,request_uri,path,url,"")))
      | eval status_code=""
      | eval clientip=trim(toString(coalesce(client_ip,src_ip,ip,remote_addr,"")))
      | eval auth_provider=trim(toString(coalesce(auth_provider,authProvider,idp_provider,"")))
      | eval service_account=trim(toString(coalesce(service_account,serviceAccount,is_service_account,"0")))
      | eval permission=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(permission,perm,acl_permission,""))))
      | eval role=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(role,grafana_role,org_role,""))))
      | eval folder_uid=trim(toString(coalesce(folder_uid,folderUid,uid_folder,"")))
      | eval folder_title=trim(toString(coalesce(folder_title,folderTitle,"")))
      | eval dashboard_uid=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboard_uid,dashboardUid,uid_dash,"")))
      | eval dashboard_title=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboard_title,dashboardTitle,"")))
      | eval datasource_id=trim(toString(coalesce(datasource_id,datasourceId,ds_id,"")))
      | eval datasource_name=trim(toString(coalesce(datasource_name,datasourceName,ds_name,"")))
      | eval team_id=trim(toString(coalesce(team_id,teamId,"")))
      | eval inheritance_chain=trim(toString(coalesce(inheritance_chain,inheritanceChain,"folder_default")))
      | eval resource_uid=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(resource_uid,folder_uid,dashboard_uid,datasource_id,target,"unknown_resource"))))
      | eval acl_entries=if(match(lr,"permission|acl|role|team"),1,0)
      | eval detect_axis=if(match(lr,"builtin|fixedrole|default permission"),"builtin_role_drift",if(match(lr,"teamsync|ldap|group"),"team_sync_drift","audit_permission_mutation")) ]
    [ search index=grafana sourcetype=grafana:apilog earliest=-24h@h latest=now
      | eval lane="api_access"
      | eval org_id=trim(toString(coalesce(orgId,org_id,"0")))
      | eval org_name=trim(toString(coalesce(org_name,orgName,"")))
      | eval actor=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(actor,username,remote_user,user,"api_actor"))))
      | eval user_login=actor
      | eval user_id=actor
      | eval httpmethod=upper(trim(toString(coalesce(httpmethod,method,http_method,verb,"GET"))))
      | eval endpoint=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(endpoint,uri,request_uri,path,""))))
      | eval status_code=trim(toString(coalesce(status_code,status,http_status,"200")))
      | eval clientip=trim(toString(coalesce(client_ip,src_ip,ip,remote_addr,"")))
      | eval auth_provider=trim(toString(coalesce(auth_provider,authProvider,"reverse_proxy")))
      | eval service_account=trim(toString(coalesce(service_account,serviceAccount,"0")))
      | eval target=endpoint
      | eval permission=""
      | eval role=""
      | eval folder_uid=""
      | eval folder_title=""
      | eval dashboard_uid=""
      | eval dashboard_title=""
      | eval datasource_id=""
      | eval datasource_name=""
      | eval team_id=""
      | eval inheritance_chain="api_direct"
      | eval resource_uid=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(resource_uid,md5(endpoint),endpoint,"api_path"))))
      | eval acl_entries=0
      | eval detect_axis=if(match(endpoint,"/api/admin/users") OR match(endpoint,"/api/folders/") AND match(endpoint,"/permissions") OR match(endpoint,"/api/teams/") AND match(httpmethod,"DELETE|PUT|POST"),"privileged_api_forensics","http_telemetry") ]
    [ search index=grafana sourcetype=grafana:permission_snapshot earliest=-24h@h latest=now
      | eval lane="permission_inventory"
      | eval org_id=trim(toString(coalesce(orgId,org_id,"0")))
      | eval org_name=trim(toString(coalesce(org_name,orgName,"")))
      | eval actor="inventory_job"
      | eval user_login="inventory_job"
      | eval user_id="inventory_job"
      | eval httpmethod="GET"
      | eval endpoint="/api/permissions/snapshot"
      | eval status_code="200"
      | eval clientip="127.0.0.1"
      | eval auth_provider="automation"
      | eval service_account="1"
      | eval folder_uid=trim(toString(coalesce(folder_uid,folderUid,"")))
      | eval folder_title=trim(toString(coalesce(folder_title,folderTitle,"")))
      | eval dashboard_uid=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboard_uid,dashboardUid,"")))
      | eval dashboard_title=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboard_title,dashboardTitle,"")))
      | eval datasource_id=trim(toString(coalesce(datasource_id,datasourceId,"")))
      | eval datasource_name=trim(toString(coalesce(datasource_name,datasourceName,"")))
      | eval team_id=trim(toString(coalesce(team_id,teamId,"")))
      | eval user_grantee=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(user_login,userLogin,grantee_login,""))))
      | eval permission=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(permission,perm,""))))
      | eval role=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(role,grafana_role,""))))
      | eval inheritance_chain=trim(toString(coalesce(inheritance_chain,inheritanceChain,"folder_to_dashboard")))
      | eval resource_uid=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(resource_uid,coalesce(folder_uid,dashboard_uid,datasource_id,"snap_unknown")))))
      | eval target=resource_uid
      | eval acl_entries=tonumber(trim(toString(coalesce(acl_entry_count,acl_entries,permission_entry_count,"1"))),10)
      | eval detect_axis=if(acl_entries>=50,"folder_acl_explosion","inventory_baseline_diff") ]
    [ search (index=notable OR index=itsi_tracked_alerts) source=grafana_permission_correlation earliest=-24h@h latest=now
      | eval lane="siem_itsi_correlation"
      | eval org_id=trim(toString(coalesce(org_id,orgId,"0")))
      | eval org_name=trim(toString(coalesce(org_name,"")))
      | eval actor=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(user,user_name,owner,"correlation"))))
      | eval user_login=actor
      | eval user_id=actor
      | eval httpmethod=""
      | eval endpoint=trim(toString(coalesce(search_name,rule_name,"grafana_permission_correlation")))
      | eval status_code=trim(toString(coalesce(severity,urgency,"info")))
      | eval clientip=trim(toString(coalesce(src,src_ip,"")))
      | eval auth_provider="itsi_es"
      | eval service_account="0"
      | eval folder_uid=trim(toString(coalesce(folder_uid,"")))
      | eval folder_title=trim(toString(coalesce(folder_title,"")))
      | eval dashboard_uid=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboard_uid,"")))
      | eval dashboard_title=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboard_title,"")))
      | eval datasource_id=trim(toString(coalesce(datasource_id,"")))
      | eval datasource_name=trim(toString(coalesce(datasource_name,"")))
      | eval team_id=trim(toString(coalesce(team_id,"")))
      | eval permission=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(permission,""))))
      | eval role=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(role,""))))
      | eval inheritance_chain=trim(toString(coalesce(inheritance_chain,"correlated")))
      | eval resource_uid=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(resource_uid,dashboard_uid,folder_uid,"corr_unknown"))))
      | eval target=resource_uid
      | eval acl_entries=tonumber(trim(toString(coalesce(acl_entries,"0"))),10)
      | eval detect_axis="notable_itsi_escalation" ]
| eval org_id=coalesce(nullif(trim(org_id),""),"0")
| eval resource_uid=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(resource_uid,"unknown_resource"))))
| eval user_login=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(user_login,user_id,actor,"unknown_user"))))
| eval permission=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(permission,""))))
| eval role=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(role,""))))
| eval acl_entries=coalesce(acl_entries,0)
| sort 0 resource_uid _time
| streamstats window=14 current=t global=f sum(acl_entries) AS rolling_acl_mass last(acl_entries) AS prev_acl_entries BY resource_uid lane
| eventstats median(acl_entries) AS acl_med p90(acl_entries) AS acl_p90 BY org_id lane
| eval acl_explosion_flag=if(rolling_acl_mass>=50 OR acl_entries>=50 OR acl_p90>=45,1,0)
| eval inheritance_bypass_hint=if(match(inheritance_chain,"explicit_dashboard|dashboard_override|break_inherit"),1,0)
| join type=left max=0 org_id
    [| inputlookup grafana_org_inventory.csv
     | eval org_id=trim(toString(org_id))
     | fields org_id org_name owner sensitivity_tier approved_roles]
| join type=left max=0 resource_uid
    [| inputlookup grafana_permission_baseline.csv
     | eval resource_uid=lower(trim(toString(resource_uid)))
     | fields resource_uid resource_type expected_role_assignments]
| eval approved_roles_l=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(approved_roles,""))))
| eval expected_role_assignments_l=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(expected_role_assignments,""))))
| eval grant_combo=lower(trim(toString(mvjoin(mvappend(permission,role),":"))))
| eval baseline_drift=if(len(expected_role_assignments_l)>0 AND len(grant_combo)>0 AND !match(expected_role_assignments_l,grant_combo) AND match(grant_combo,"edit|admin|datasource:query"),1,0)
| eval external_identity_flag=if(match(user_login,"gmail\\.com|yahoo\\.com|hotmail\\.com|mail\\.ru") AND match(sensitivity_tier,"high|pci|prod"),1,0)
| join type=left max=0 user_login
    [| tstats summariesonly=t count AS change_evt_count FROM datamodel=Change WHERE nodename=Change earliest=-24h@h latest=now BY Change.user
     | rename Change.user AS user_login
     | eval user_login=lower(trim(toString(user_login))) ]
| eval change_evt_count=coalesce(change_evt_count,0)
| eval severity=case(
    external_identity_flag==1 AND match(permission,"edit|admin|query"), "critical",
    acl_explosion_flag==1, "high",
    baseline_drift==1 AND match(permission,"admin|edit|datasource:query|datasource:admin"), "high",
    inheritance_bypass_hint==1 AND match(permission,"edit|admin"), "high",
    match(detect_axis,"privileged_api_forensics") AND match(httpmethod,"POST|PUT|DELETE") AND match(endpoint,"/api/admin/|/permissions|/api/teams/"), "high",
    match(detect_axis,"notable_itsi_escalation"), "medium",
    match(detect_axis,"builtin_role_drift|team_sync_drift"), "medium",
    true(), "low")
| eval recommended_action=case(
    external_identity_flag==1, "revoke_non_corporate_grant_validate_idp_and_cmdb_scope",
    acl_explosion_flag==1, "triage_folder_acl_simplify_teams_reconcile_gitops",
    baseline_drift==1, "compare_live_permissions_to_baseline_open_grafana_rbac_change",
    inheritance_bypass_hint==1, "remove_dashboard_acl_override_realign_folder_inheritance",
    match(detect_axis,"privileged_api_forensics"), "trace_api_actor_session_source_ip_and_breakglass",
    match(detect_axis,"notable_itsi_escalation"), "follow_es_itsi_episode_link_grafana_audit_context",
    true(), "refresh_permission_snapshot_exporter_and_lookup_baselines")
| table _time org_id org_name resource_uid folder_uid dashboard_uid datasource_id datasource_name user_login permission role team_id detect_axis clientip auth_provider service_account inheritance_chain severity baseline_drift acl_entries rolling_acl_mass recommended_action change_evt_count
```


savedsearches.conf sketch:

```ini
[observability_uc_13_6_10_grafana_rbac_permission_drift_alert]
cron_schedule = */15 * * * *
dispatch.earliest_time = -24h@h
dispatch.latest_time = now
enableSched = 1
action.email = 1
action.email.to = platform-observability-oncall@example.com
action.email.subject = Grafana RBAC drift $result.severity$ org=$result.org_id$ resource=$result.resource_uid$
counttype = number of events
relation = greater than
quantity = 0
search = | savedsearch observability_uc_13_6_10_grafana_rbac_permission_drift | where severity IN ("critical","high")
```

Performance: if multisearch queue time exceeds targets, materialize each lane hourly into a summary index keyed on `resource_uid` and `org_id`, widen detection windows on summaries, and retain this full search for investigations. For very large enterprises, shard snapshot jobs per `org_id` using a macro token.

### Step 4 — Validate

Ground truth begins in Grafana UI permission panels and Enterprise RBAC screens for the same `resource_uid` and window. Pick a Splunk row with `baseline_drift=1` and confirm the live folder or dashboard ACL differs from `grafana_permission_baseline.csv` intentionally or not. Export `/api/folders/{uid}/permissions` and compare JSON to the latest `grafana:permission_snapshot` event.

API forensics validation: select a `privileged_api_forensics` row, open `grafana:apilog` details for method, path, and `clientip`, then correlate to `grafana:audit` actor fields. Mismatches often indicate proxy header trust issues rather than Grafana bugs.

ACL explosion validation: when `rolling_acl_mass` crosses thresholds, open the folder ACL editor and count team and user rows; confirm whether legacy programs added duplicate team grants.

Synthetic positive test: in lab, grant a non-corporate test user Editor on a high-sensitivity org folder and confirm `critical` severity with `external_identity_flag` style logic within two windows after lookups classify the org tier.

Synthetic negative test: revert the grant, refresh baselines, and confirm sustained `low` severity for the test `resource_uid` across six consecutive runs.

Runbook linkage: document expected noise during planned org-wide RBAC migrations so validators compare against change calendars.

### Step 5 — Operationalize & Troubleshoot

Case 1 — Folder permission diff versus baseline after emergency incident response: capture Grafana audit exports, reconcile `grafana_permission_baseline.csv` under change control, and schedule a snapshot rerun before closing the bridge.

Case 2 — Dashboard inheritance bypass where explicit dashboard ACL overrides folder Viewer lockdown: remove overrides, restore inheritance, and teach dashboard owners to use folder-level grants with documented exceptions.

Case 3 — Datasource permission elevation granting low-privilege teams direct query on PostgreSQL or Splunk: downgrade to query-only roles through Grafana data source permissions, enforce read-only database roles, and validate no raw SQL escapes through explore sessions.

Case 4 — Builtin role drift after Grafana upgrade changing Viewer defaults: read vendor release notes, compare `/api/access-control/builtin-roles` exports before and after, and file a platform change if defaults broaden unexpectedly.

Case 5 — Team sync versus LDAP or OAuth provider drift when a mapped group rename orphan teams: refresh team sync mappings, delete stale team ACL rows, and pair directory change tickets with Grafana evidence.

Case 6 — Folder ACL explosion with fifty or more accumulated team entries: run ACL hygiene workshops, deduplicate teams, and move recurring contributors into a smaller set of named groups.

Case 7 — Service account token issuance with long-lived org-admin scopes: migrate callers to short-lived tokens, enforce rotation calendars, and label automation identities in `grafana_org_inventory.csv`.

Case 8 — Enterprise RBAC direct assignment on `/api/access-control/users/{userId}/permissions` bypassing folder semantics: inventory fixed roles, align with least-privilege patterns, and require approvals for direct user grants.

Case 9 — Privileged API usage from unexpected `clientip` ranges or non-SSO identities: invalidate sessions, rotate break-glass passwords, and tighten admin route network policies.

Case 10 — Planned org-wide RBAC migration producing temporary elevation noise: gate alerts with change metadata and compare against approved maintenance tickets rather than muting blindly.

Case 11 — GitOps reconciler or automation rewriting ACLs every minute: tag service accounts, raise thresholds for known automation lanes, and keep Git as the authoritative intent store.

Closing checklist: five em-dash step headers are present; Step 3 fenced SPL matches the `spl` field exactly; multisearch lists four arms; required SPL verbs appear; final `table` includes nineteen analyst-visible columns including `change_evt_count` for Change model enrichment context.

## SPL

```spl
`comment("UC-13.6.10 Grafana RBAC permission drift privileged API forensics multisearch earliest=-24h@h")`
| multisearch
    [ search index=grafana sourcetype=grafana:audit earliest=-24h@h latest=now
      | eval lane="audit_rbac"
      | eval lr=lower(_raw)
      | eval org_id=trim(toString(coalesce(orgId,org_id,"0")))
      | eval org_name=trim(toString(coalesce(org_name,orgName,"")))
      | eval actor=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(userId,user_id,username,actor,email,"unknown_actor"))))
      | eval user_login=actor
      | eval user_id=actor
      | eval target=trim(toString(coalesce(target,resourceUid,resource_uid,object_uid,"")))
      | eval httpmethod=""
      | eval endpoint=trim(toString(coalesce(requestUri,request_uri,path,url,"")))
      | eval status_code=""
      | eval clientip=trim(toString(coalesce(client_ip,src_ip,ip,remote_addr,"")))
      | eval auth_provider=trim(toString(coalesce(auth_provider,authProvider,idp_provider,"")))
      | eval service_account=trim(toString(coalesce(service_account,serviceAccount,is_service_account,"0")))
      | eval permission=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(permission,perm,acl_permission,""))))
      | eval role=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(role,grafana_role,org_role,""))))
      | eval folder_uid=trim(toString(coalesce(folder_uid,folderUid,uid_folder,"")))
      | eval folder_title=trim(toString(coalesce(folder_title,folderTitle,"")))
      | eval dashboard_uid=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboard_uid,dashboardUid,uid_dash,"")))
      | eval dashboard_title=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboard_title,dashboardTitle,"")))
      | eval datasource_id=trim(toString(coalesce(datasource_id,datasourceId,ds_id,"")))
      | eval datasource_name=trim(toString(coalesce(datasource_name,datasourceName,ds_name,"")))
      | eval team_id=trim(toString(coalesce(team_id,teamId,"")))
      | eval inheritance_chain=trim(toString(coalesce(inheritance_chain,inheritanceChain,"folder_default")))
      | eval resource_uid=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(resource_uid,folder_uid,dashboard_uid,datasource_id,target,"unknown_resource"))))
      | eval acl_entries=if(match(lr,"permission|acl|role|team"),1,0)
      | eval detect_axis=if(match(lr,"builtin|fixedrole|default permission"),"builtin_role_drift",if(match(lr,"teamsync|ldap|group"),"team_sync_drift","audit_permission_mutation")) ]
    [ search index=grafana sourcetype=grafana:apilog earliest=-24h@h latest=now
      | eval lane="api_access"
      | eval org_id=trim(toString(coalesce(orgId,org_id,"0")))
      | eval org_name=trim(toString(coalesce(org_name,orgName,"")))
      | eval actor=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(actor,username,remote_user,user,"api_actor"))))
      | eval user_login=actor
      | eval user_id=actor
      | eval httpmethod=upper(trim(toString(coalesce(httpmethod,method,http_method,verb,"GET"))))
      | eval endpoint=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(endpoint,uri,request_uri,path,""))))
      | eval status_code=trim(toString(coalesce(status_code,status,http_status,"200")))
      | eval clientip=trim(toString(coalesce(client_ip,src_ip,ip,remote_addr,"")))
      | eval auth_provider=trim(toString(coalesce(auth_provider,authProvider,"reverse_proxy")))
      | eval service_account=trim(toString(coalesce(service_account,serviceAccount,"0")))
      | eval target=endpoint
      | eval permission=""
      | eval role=""
      | eval folder_uid=""
      | eval folder_title=""
      | eval dashboard_uid=""
      | eval dashboard_title=""
      | eval datasource_id=""
      | eval datasource_name=""
      | eval team_id=""
      | eval inheritance_chain="api_direct"
      | eval resource_uid=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(resource_uid,md5(endpoint),endpoint,"api_path"))))
      | eval acl_entries=0
      | eval detect_axis=if(match(endpoint,"/api/admin/users") OR match(endpoint,"/api/folders/") AND match(endpoint,"/permissions") OR match(endpoint,"/api/teams/") AND match(httpmethod,"DELETE|PUT|POST"),"privileged_api_forensics","http_telemetry") ]
    [ search index=grafana sourcetype=grafana:permission_snapshot earliest=-24h@h latest=now
      | eval lane="permission_inventory"
      | eval org_id=trim(toString(coalesce(orgId,org_id,"0")))
      | eval org_name=trim(toString(coalesce(org_name,orgName,"")))
      | eval actor="inventory_job"
      | eval user_login="inventory_job"
      | eval user_id="inventory_job"
      | eval httpmethod="GET"
      | eval endpoint="/api/permissions/snapshot"
      | eval status_code="200"
      | eval clientip="127.0.0.1"
      | eval auth_provider="automation"
      | eval service_account="1"
      | eval folder_uid=trim(toString(coalesce(folder_uid,folderUid,"")))
      | eval folder_title=trim(toString(coalesce(folder_title,folderTitle,"")))
      | eval dashboard_uid=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboard_uid,dashboardUid,"")))
      | eval dashboard_title=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboard_title,dashboardTitle,"")))
      | eval datasource_id=trim(toString(coalesce(datasource_id,datasourceId,"")))
      | eval datasource_name=trim(toString(coalesce(datasource_name,datasourceName,"")))
      | eval team_id=trim(toString(coalesce(team_id,teamId,"")))
      | eval user_grantee=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(user_login,userLogin,grantee_login,""))))
      | eval permission=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(permission,perm,""))))
      | eval role=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(role,grafana_role,""))))
      | eval inheritance_chain=trim(toString(coalesce(inheritance_chain,inheritanceChain,"folder_to_dashboard")))
      | eval resource_uid=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(resource_uid,coalesce(folder_uid,dashboard_uid,datasource_id,"snap_unknown")))))
      | eval target=resource_uid
      | eval acl_entries=tonumber(trim(toString(coalesce(acl_entry_count,acl_entries,permission_entry_count,"1"))),10)
      | eval detect_axis=if(acl_entries>=50,"folder_acl_explosion","inventory_baseline_diff") ]
    [ search (index=notable OR index=itsi_tracked_alerts) source=grafana_permission_correlation earliest=-24h@h latest=now
      | eval lane="siem_itsi_correlation"
      | eval org_id=trim(toString(coalesce(org_id,orgId,"0")))
      | eval org_name=trim(toString(coalesce(org_name,"")))
      | eval actor=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(user,user_name,owner,"correlation"))))
      | eval user_login=actor
      | eval user_id=actor
      | eval httpmethod=""
      | eval endpoint=trim(toString(coalesce(search_name,rule_name,"grafana_permission_correlation")))
      | eval status_code=trim(toString(coalesce(severity,urgency,"info")))
      | eval clientip=trim(toString(coalesce(src,src_ip,"")))
      | eval auth_provider="itsi_es"
      | eval service_account="0"
      | eval folder_uid=trim(toString(coalesce(folder_uid,"")))
      | eval folder_title=trim(toString(coalesce(folder_title,"")))
      | eval dashboard_uid=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboard_uid,"")))
      | eval dashboard_title=trim(toString(coalesce(dashboard_title,"")))
      | eval datasource_id=trim(toString(coalesce(datasource_id,"")))
      | eval datasource_name=trim(toString(coalesce(datasource_name,"")))
      | eval team_id=trim(toString(coalesce(team_id,"")))
      | eval permission=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(permission,""))))
      | eval role=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(role,""))))
      | eval inheritance_chain=trim(toString(coalesce(inheritance_chain,"correlated")))
      | eval resource_uid=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(resource_uid,dashboard_uid,folder_uid,"corr_unknown"))))
      | eval target=resource_uid
      | eval acl_entries=tonumber(trim(toString(coalesce(acl_entries,"0"))),10)
      | eval detect_axis="notable_itsi_escalation" ]
| eval org_id=coalesce(nullif(trim(org_id),""),"0")
| eval resource_uid=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(resource_uid,"unknown_resource"))))
| eval user_login=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(user_login,user_id,actor,"unknown_user"))))
| eval permission=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(permission,""))))
| eval role=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(role,""))))
| eval acl_entries=coalesce(acl_entries,0)
| sort 0 resource_uid _time
| streamstats window=14 current=t global=f sum(acl_entries) AS rolling_acl_mass last(acl_entries) AS prev_acl_entries BY resource_uid lane
| eventstats median(acl_entries) AS acl_med p90(acl_entries) AS acl_p90 BY org_id lane
| eval acl_explosion_flag=if(rolling_acl_mass>=50 OR acl_entries>=50 OR acl_p90>=45,1,0)
| eval inheritance_bypass_hint=if(match(inheritance_chain,"explicit_dashboard|dashboard_override|break_inherit"),1,0)
| join type=left max=0 org_id
    [| inputlookup grafana_org_inventory.csv
     | eval org_id=trim(toString(org_id))
     | fields org_id org_name owner sensitivity_tier approved_roles]
| join type=left max=0 resource_uid
    [| inputlookup grafana_permission_baseline.csv
     | eval resource_uid=lower(trim(toString(resource_uid)))
     | fields resource_uid resource_type expected_role_assignments]
| eval approved_roles_l=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(approved_roles,""))))
| eval expected_role_assignments_l=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(expected_role_assignments,""))))
| eval grant_combo=lower(trim(toString(mvjoin(mvappend(permission,role),":"))))
| eval baseline_drift=if(len(expected_role_assignments_l)>0 AND len(grant_combo)>0 AND !match(expected_role_assignments_l,grant_combo) AND match(grant_combo,"edit|admin|datasource:query"),1,0)
| eval external_identity_flag=if(match(user_login,"gmail\\.com|yahoo\\.com|hotmail\\.com|mail\\.ru") AND match(sensitivity_tier,"high|pci|prod"),1,0)
| join type=left max=0 user_login
    [| tstats summariesonly=t count AS change_evt_count FROM datamodel=Change WHERE nodename=Change earliest=-24h@h latest=now BY Change.user
     | rename Change.user AS user_login
     | eval user_login=lower(trim(toString(user_login))) ]
| eval change_evt_count=coalesce(change_evt_count,0)
| eval severity=case(
    external_identity_flag==1 AND match(permission,"edit|admin|query"), "critical",
    acl_explosion_flag==1, "high",
    baseline_drift==1 AND match(permission,"admin|edit|datasource:query|datasource:admin"), "high",
    inheritance_bypass_hint==1 AND match(permission,"edit|admin"), "high",
    match(detect_axis,"privileged_api_forensics") AND match(httpmethod,"POST|PUT|DELETE") AND match(endpoint,"/api/admin/|/permissions|/api/teams/"), "high",
    match(detect_axis,"notable_itsi_escalation"), "medium",
    match(detect_axis,"builtin_role_drift|team_sync_drift"), "medium",
    true(), "low")
| eval recommended_action=case(
    external_identity_flag==1, "revoke_non_corporate_grant_validate_idp_and_cmdb_scope",
    acl_explosion_flag==1, "triage_folder_acl_simplify_teams_reconcile_gitops",
    baseline_drift==1, "compare_live_permissions_to_baseline_open_grafana_rbac_change",
    inheritance_bypass_hint==1, "remove_dashboard_acl_override_realign_folder_inheritance",
    match(detect_axis,"privileged_api_forensics"), "trace_api_actor_session_source_ip_and_breakglass",
    match(detect_axis,"notable_itsi_escalation"), "follow_es_itsi_episode_link_grafana_audit_context",
    true(), "refresh_permission_snapshot_exporter_and_lookup_baselines")
| table _time org_id org_name resource_uid folder_uid dashboard_uid datasource_id datasource_name user_login permission role team_id detect_axis clientip auth_provider service_account inheritance_chain severity baseline_drift acl_entries rolling_acl_mass recommended_action change_evt_count
```

## CIM SPL

```spl
| tstats summariesonly=t latest(Change.object) AS chg_object latest(Change.command) AS chg_cmd count AS chg_cnt FROM datamodel=Change WHERE nodename=Change (Change.object="grafana*" OR Change.app="grafana") earliest=-24h@h latest=now BY Change.user Change.dest
| rename Change.user AS actor Change.dest AS grafana_host
| table actor grafana_host chg_object chg_cmd chg_cnt
```

## Visualization

Severity-colored table by org_id and resource_uid with drilldowns to raw grafana:audit, grafana:apilog, grafana:permission_snapshot rows, and ES or ITSI correlation events; single-value tiles for acl_explosion_flag counts; timeline of rolling_acl_mass per folder.

## Known False Positives

Planned org-wide RBAC migrations temporarily elevate grants and rewrite ACLs until cutover completes; correlate with change tickets before paging application teams. Deliberate folder permission promotion during cross-team handovers mimics drift until baselines refresh the day after ownership transfer. Scheduled service-account rotation can mint short-lived elevated tokens that look abusive without automation labels in inventory. Grafana version upgrades sometimes reshape default Viewer permissions or migrate legacy ACL representations; read release notes and extend suppression windows around upgrades. Automated GitOps reconcilers and external ACL writers may touch permission endpoints every minute; tag their identities and tune thresholds rather than treating steady-state automation as incident traffic. Dashboard ownership transfers after reorganizations create benign baseline mismatches until CSV baselines catch up. Development and sandbox orgs with looser baselines intentionally diverge from production posture; use sensitivity_tier in grafana_org_inventory.csv to downgrade non-production noise.

- [Grafana — Folder permissions HTTP API](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/developers/http_api/folder_permissions/)
- [Grafana — Dashboard permissions HTTP API](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/developers/http_api/dashboard_permissions/)
- [Grafana — Data source permissions HTTP API](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/developers/http_api/datasource_permissions/)
- [Grafana — Configure team sync](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/setup-grafana/configure-security/configure-team-sync/)
- [Grafana — Fine-grained access control RBAC](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/administration/roles-and-permissions/access-control-rbac/)
